desc: Dismisses a specific Revit warning by its index position in the warnings list.
summary: Dismisses a specific Revit warning by its index position in the warnings list. Requires user confirmation before execution (AI must ask first). Uses Document.GetWarnings() to locate the target warning, then opens a transaction with a custom IFailuresPreprocessor that calls FailuresAccessor.DeleteWarning(FailureMessageAccessor).
usecase: User confirms a warning is safe to dismiss after AI review.
notfor: Dismissing all warnings of a type (use DismissAllRevitWarningsOfSameType instead).
precondition: Active document must have at least one warning.
postcondition: The targeted warning is dismissed. Warning count reduced by 1.

config_inputs.name: WarningIndex
config_inputs.description: Zero-based index of the warning to dismiss
